LEGO wind-rippled dunes pattern tan-brick ridges in parallel geometric waves, dark-orange shadow-bricks filling troughs, scattered grey pebble-pieces dotting crests.
Clay monsoon gully carves deep green textured-clay, fingerprint erosion-channels streaming downslope, brown mudflow-clay spreading across the rain-soaked handmade terrain.
LEGO tide-pool ledges stack grey-brick shelves with transparent-teal water-bricks pooling, orange anemone-pieces and purple urchin-clusters dotting the geometric intertidal zone.
LEGO autumn-oak forest spreads rust-brick canopy overhead, brown trunk-bricks clustered throughout, golden leaf-pieces carpeting the geometric forest floor completely.
Clay crater-rim circles rust-orange textured clay around deep shadow-bowl, thumbprint impact-patterns radiating outward, scattered ejecta-clay fragments dotting handmade lunar surface.
